svg.title: Linux PAM three-layer architecture
svg.desc: Three horizontal bands stacked top to bottom: PAM-aware applications (gdm, sshd, sudo, login, su), the PAM core configuration layer, and PAM authentication modules (pam_unix, pam_fprintd, pam_krb5, pam_sss, pam_face).

g.text: Reads /etc/pam.d/ · chains modules · returns success or failure
